projects.name: Contributor Welcome Flow
projects.recentActivity: Refined onboarding checklist and paired first-time issues with maintainers.
projects.summary: Helps new contributors find a clear first step and connect with the right project guide.

projects.name: Release Notes Refresh
projects.recentActivity: Drafted the next milestone outline and gathered examples from recent releases.
projects.summary: Improves how contributors understand what changed and where documentation help is needed.

projects.name: Issue Triage Automation
projects.recentActivity: Label mapping is ready, but review rules still need maintainer approval.
projects.summary: Reduces manual triage work so maintainers can focus on coaching and code review.

projects.name: Accessibility Audit
projects.recentActivity: Waiting for updated design tokens before final contrast checks can continue.
projects.summary: Tracks accessibility improvements and highlights where contributors can test key flows.

projects.name: Community Metrics Snapshot
projects.recentActivity: Published the monthly contributor activity summary and shared follow-up questions.
projects.summary: Gives the team a lightweight pulse on participation trends and support needs.

projects.name: Documentation Garden
projects.recentActivity: Merged three guide updates and opened a tracking issue for stale screenshots.
projects.summary: Keeps contributor-facing docs tidy, accurate, and easy to improve in small batches.
